name: AD5X Nopoop .25
printer_notes:
Turn Multimaterial -> Purge in prime tower ON for Nopoop mode
Turn Multimaterial -> Purge in prime tower OFF for Poop mode (slicer-controlled poop; will respect your flush volumes)

After using poop mode with this profile make sure to set your zMod USE_TRASH_ON_PRINT setting back to 0 or 1 before printing GCode sliced without this profile.
